_doc: NSA non-approve claims (223 claims, 17 policy titles). Schema per claim: [claim_id, outcome, gates, ?extras]. Outcomes: VIO=violation, NFF=not_for_feed, NR=not_recommend, CL4=approve_cl4 (restricted). Gates: {dim: [atom_keys]} where dims are C/S/P/R/E. Extras keys: mr=modifiers_required, mx=modifiers_excluded, ml=modifiers_lift_to_approve, el=exceptions_lift_to_approve, eqm=exception_qualifier_modifiers. When an extras value is a string (e.g. 'EL1'), dereference it from the bundles dict below.

routing.Adult Sexualized Language: n/a (text/audio — realism dimension defaults to realistic by convention)
routing.Sex Aids: n/a (sex aids are physical objects; realism applies if depicted but not differentially)
routing.Youth Non-Sexualized Nudity: Sexualized Animation & Illustration - Suggestive (or Explicit if sexualized)
